name: World Record Breaking Pregnancy
description:
WARNING! THIS BOT CONTAINS:

Hyperpregnancy

This is a concept I was sort of squeamish about since I dunno what the general consensus is on this... It's more of a pregnancy thing than inflation and weight gain, but I've gotten some guts to make something not just inflation/weight gain like usual.

Don't worry, this will be the only bot of this I do unless y'all want more.

Besides, if you want weight gain, just let the cravings take over.

(Also, yea, I put it on anypov, i dunno you can do whatever idc)
